HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RAINER GEISSLER'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-28-2007 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: PAUL PERDUE FOR PLAINTIFF RAYMOND YOUNG
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY LINDA QUINN FOR DEFENDANT RAINER GEISSLER

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR POSSESSION OF 593 PORTRERO STREET # D. JUDGMENT WILL ONLY BE FILED IF THERE IS A BREACH. DEFENDANT TO PAY $2000 ON THE FIRST OF EACH MONTH STARTING ON 3/1/07. (PAYMENT MADE IN COURT TODAY FOR 3/1/07). DEFENDANT TO VACATE ON OR BEFORE 9/1/07. CURRENT DAMAGES ARE $3000. IF DEFENDANT VACATES, PLAINTIFF WILL WAIVE DAMAGES OF $3000, ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS, AND FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE.
IF DEFENDANT BREACHES THE TERMS OF THIS AGREEMENT, PLAINTIFF MAY APPLY, EX PARTE, FOR JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION; $3000 DAMAGES; ATTORNEY FEES; AND COSTS.
PLAINTIFF WILL PREPARE WRITTEN STIPULATION AND FORWARD IT TO DEFENDANT FOR SIGNATURE.
ALL PARTIES VOIR DIRED AND AGREE TO TERMS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:WILL CHEN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS;REPORTER:SUSAN LEE(218)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT RAINER GEISSLER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR AS FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT WAS FILED ON 1/30/07. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Feb-07-2007 Denied
